build_or_load_accepted_partial_predecode: observed_min_coverage default was 0.0 and no dataset-specific rejection was enforced

v1_root_cause.can_rebuild_from_raw_vipseg_observed_fra: not completed in this protocol-hardening pass; requires a dedicated raw VIPSeg crop materialization job because predecode covers only 284/3149 VIPSeg items.
v1_root_cause.repair_strategy: fixed dataset-name aliases and rebuilt observed features from local predecode crops; remaining blocker is missing VIPSeg predecode/raw observed crop materialization.
v1_root_cause.vipseg_observed_feature_mask_was_all_fal: dataset-name casing mismatch: item keys use VIPSEG while local predecode files use VIPSeg; old lookup did not try aliases.

vipseg_samples_have_semantic_crop_valid: derived from observed valid mask and raw mask-derived boxes
vipseg_samples_have_semantic_rgb_crop: raw fast path reconstructs observed crops from frames/masks/bboxes instead of Stage2 __getitem__ semantic_rgb_crop tensor
vipseg_samples_have_semantic_rgb_crop_te: not required by raw fast path; observed last-frame crop is used
why_vipseg_crops_did_not_enter_observed_: partial predecode was accepted with observed_min_coverage=0 and exact VIPSEG casing failed before alias repair
